sizing_rule.note: Optimal f = 1 unit per $8.00 equity (12.5% per unit). Only trade after wins when dependency detected; skip after losses. Treat dependent/independent trade sequences as separate systems.

source_rule_text: Trade optimal f of 1 unit for every $8.00 in equity, and only bet the optimal amount after a win; do not bet after a loss when dependency is present in the market system.
